nodes.name: Check Skip Conditions
nodes.notes: Task 00010: computes skip=true for draft PRs and PRs labeled 'skip-review'.

nodes.name: Skip Draft & Labeled PRs?
nodes.notes: True branch continues to review; false branch ends the run without comments.

nodes.name: Fetch PR Files
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth with name 'Authorization', value 'Bearer <GitHub PAT>' (task 00002).

nodes.name: Claude Review
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth with name 'x-api-key', value '<Anthropic API key>'.

nodes.name: Post PR Comment
nodes.notes: Same GitHub PAT credential as 'Fetch PR Files'.
